channel.title: AutonoMath Announcements
channel.description: Release notes, dataset ingests, and major migrations for AutonoMath (operated by Bookyou Inc.). A unified REST API and MCP server covering Japanese subsidies, loans, tax measures, certifications, laws, court decisions, bids, and qualified-invoice registrants.

item.title: v0.3.0 released — V4 + Phase A absorption complete (8.29 GB unified DB)
item.description: Shipped 2026-04-25. MCP tools 55 to 72 (39 jpintel + 33 autonomath at default gates), entities 424,054 to 503,930, facts 5.26M to 6.12M. pyproject.toml, server.json, mcp-server.json, dxt/manifest.json, and smithery.yaml all bumped to v0.3.0.

item.title: V4 absorption — four universal MCP tools added
item.description: Migrations 046–049 applied. Integrated 16,474 examiner-feedback annotations and 79,876 new corporate entities from gbiz (corporate_entity 87,093 to 166,969). Four universal tools (get_annotations / validate / get_provenance / get_provenance_for_fact) now exposed over both REST and MCP.

item.title: Phase A absorption — 8 static taxonomies and 36-kyotei template
item.description: Seven new tools added (list_static_resources_am, get_static_resource_am, list_example_profiles_am, get_example_profile_am, render_36_kyotei_am, get_36_kyotei_metadata_am, deep_health_am). Five example profiles and a 36-kyotei (Article 36 Labor Standards Act agreement) template are live; render_36_kyotei_am stays behind a launch gate pending 社労士 review.

item.title: Unified DB migration — autonomath.db is now the primary store
item.description: Migration 032 physically merged jpintel.db tables into autonomath.db (8.29 GB) under a jpi_* prefix. 78 mirrored tables plus four cross-domain views (entity_id_map, v_program_full, v_houjin_360, v_readiness_input) were added. data/autonomath.db is now a 0-byte placeholder; production code reads from the repository root path.

item.title: Qualified-invoice registrants delta added (PDL v1.0, 13,801 rows)
item.description: Imported the National Tax Agency qualified-invoice issuer publication site as invoice_registrants under PDL v1.0 (13,801 rows, with source attribution and edit notes). The 4M-row monthly full bulk is scheduled post-launch. Downstream redistribution via the ¥3/req API is licensed under PDL v1.0.
